title: Telescoping Magnetic Pickup Tool, 4 Pieces Extendable Magnetic Pick Up Tools, Flexible Bendable Spring Magnet Stick for Picking Up Small Parts Metal Objects
features: 【High Quality Material】 This magnetic pick up tool and magnetic parts tray are made of high quality stainless steel, high strength, strong and durable, not easy to scratch or break, rust-proof, long service life, whether it's for daily home use or professional repairs, it can stand the test.

【Magnetic Tool Set】 Includes 1pc 15 LB (from 7 inches to 30.5 inches) telescopic magnetic pickup tool, 1pc 1.5 LB (from 5 inches to 25.4 inches) retractable magnetic pickup tool, 1pc 55cm flexible magnetic pickup sweeper with bendable telescopic pole, 7.5 x 7.5 cm round magnetic parts tray.

【Strong Magnetic Suction Head】 Our magnetic pick-up bar tool can quickly attach various metal parts and place them into the magnetic tray bowl, the magnetic suction cup can be retracted to narrow areas that are hard to reach, easy to operate and work efficiently.

【Strong Magnetic Tray】 The magnet tray has super strong magnetic force, which can firmly attach screws, bolts, pins, nuts, nails and other metal parts to the tray, and the tray can be fixed on the workbench with metal surface.

【Wide Range of Applications】This telescopic magnet is suitable for automotive repair, home improvement, electronic equipment maintenance and more. Whether it's removing dropped screws from the engine compartment or retrieving lost metal parts from the crevices of furniture, it's easy to handle.
description: Why choose our products? 1.These telescopic pickup tools are lightweight and portable, effectively removing paper clips, staples, batteries, pins, screws and any ferrous objects. 2.The non-slip rubber grips of the magnetic wand are comfortable to hold and the telescopic design allows the wand to access hard-to-reach areas.The perfect combination of magnetic tray and magnetic pickup tool can greatly improve the efficiency of searching for metal objects. Specification: Product Type: Kit with Magnetic Pickup Tool Material: Magnetic Tray: Stainless Steel Magnetic pick-up bar: stainless steel bar with rubber sleeve Colour: Silver Packing list: 1 × 550mm bendable model picker 1 × 1.5lb 7-section silver colour picker 1 × 15lb pickup 1 × 3 inch round magnetic bowl Service: If you have any questions about the product, please contact us by email, we will reply you within 24 hours.
